CREATE TABLE rectangles (low_point UInt64, high_point UInt64);
SELECT s2RectUnion(r1.low_point, r1.high_point, r2.low_point, r2.high_point) AS rectUnion FROM rectangles AS r1 JOIN rectangles AS r2 ON r1.low_point != r2.low_point;
SELECT s2RectUnion(5178914411069187297, 5177056748191934217, NULL, NULL) AS rectUnionWithNull;

WITH (SELECT low_point, high_point FROM rectangles LIMIT 1) AS rects1, (SELECT low_point, high_point FROM rectangles LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS rects2 SELECT s2RectUnion(rects1.low_point, rects1.high_point, rects2.low_point, rects2.high_point) AS rectUnion;
CREATE TABLE test_rectangles AS SELECT s2RectUnion(0, 0, 1, 1) AS unionRect;

SELECT s2RectUnion(r1.low_point, r1.high_point, r2.low_point, r2.high_point) FROM (SELECT low_point, high_point FROM rectangles ORDER BY low_point) AS r1 INNER JOIN (SELECT low_point, high_point FROM rectangles ORDER BY high_point DESC) AS r2 ON r1.high_point > r2.low_point;
